item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses the requested entrance-page note as the default next step, names the prior downstream overlays for queueing, documents, ticketing, and the new time-change request, reframes the recurring failure as fragmented patient-path information ownership, and moves upstream to unified guidance and rule consolidation. It does not provide the requested patch copy, placement, or implementation instructions."}
